name: Curse of the Maimed
entries: When you hit a creature cursed by your Evil Eye with an attack roll using a weapon or {@variantrule Unarmed Strike|XPHB} and roll a 19 or 20 on the {@dice d20}, you can take a {@variantrule Reaction|XPHB} and spend 2 Jinx Points to score a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}.
After you use this Misfortune, the creature is no longer cursed by your Evil Eye.
